subject: Fermi GBM trigger 475675010/160128498 is not a GRB
body:
H.-F. Yu (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 475675010/160128498
at 11:56:46.28 UT on 28 January 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to solar activity."
